data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Dietary/restriction tracking across stops'. However, while the linked use case mentions dietary restrictions being noted and venues being notified, there is no concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this functionality. The absence of specific evidence to demonstrate how dietary restrictions are tracked and managed leads to a conclusion of a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality or state checks confirming dietary/restriction tracking across stops.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
